name: China Shouguan Investment Holding Group Corporation
summary: China ShouGuan Investment Holding Group Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the project management of gold mining operations in the People's Republic of China. It holds interests in the gold mine projects in Shandong province. The company also provides mining technical advisory services; and consulting services in the areas of mine exploration and geological analysis. The company was formerly known as China ShouGuan Mining Corporation and changed its name to China ShouGuan Investment Holding Group Corporation in November 2016. China ShouGuan Investment Holding Group Corporation was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
